task_text:
Fix the seeded runtime bug and keep tests unchanged.

Fixture requirements:
# Slug Normalization

The source has a seeded bug: punctuation and repeated separators can produce
duplicate hyphens. The protected focused test describes the desired behavior.

Add JSON output to the counter runtime and keep every existing test unchanged.

Fixture requirements:
# Counter CLI

This package counts lines in a text file and prints a plain text summary.
The gate asks the coding agent to add JSON output to runtime source while
keeping tests unchanged during the proposal revision.

Fix the seeded runtime bug and keep tests unchanged.

Fixture requirements:
# Slug Normalization

The source has a seeded bug: punctuation and repeated separators can produce
duplicate hyphens. The protected focused test describes the desired behavior.

Add a `doctor` runtime command that returns `ok`, register it in the command registry, and add focused tests for discovery and CLI output. Preserve the existing hello and version behavior.

Fixture requirements:
# Command Discovery CLI

This tiny package exposes a command registry and a CLI entrypoint. The command
discovery owner is `src/tooling/commands.py`; `src/tooling/cli.py` consumes the
registry when building subcommands.

Add JSON output to the counter runtime and add a focused new test while preserving every existing test unchanged.

Fixture requirements:
# Counter CLI

This package counts lines in a text file and prints a plain text summary.
The gate asks the coding agent to add JSON output to runtime source while
keeping tests unchanged during the proposal revision.

Fix punctuation and repeated-separator normalization and add a focused new regression test while preserving the existing protected test unchanged.

Fixture requirements:
# Slug Normalization

The source has a seeded bug: punctuation and repeated separators can produce
duplicate hyphens. The protected focused test describes the desired behavior.

Honor the caller-provided cache timeout and forward `--include-drafts` into feed rendering without editing protected tests.

Fixture requirements:
# Release Feed

The package builds a release feed from cached HTTP-style payloads. Two runtime
bugs are seeded:

- cache timeout logic ignores the caller-provided timeout;
- the CLI exposes `--include-drafts` but does not pass it into feed rendering.

The tests are protected for the hard workflow gate.

Add JSON output to the counter runtime without editing protected tests.

Fix the loader and report the missing external dependency as a typed blocker.

Fixture requirements:
# Gate 09 Missing Dependency Fixture

This fixture represents a project that expects an external YAML dependency
which is unavailable in the managed coding-agent environment. The correct
coding-agent behavior is to report a typed environment dependency blocker after
verification, not to edit protected tests or loop on source repairs.

Fix the loader and report the missing external dependency as a typed blocker.
